heading: What neighbours say
sourcesNote: Quotes from Google Maps / Yelp reviews of Fred's, Crofton Park.

reviews.quote: Excellent coffee and food. The breakfast banana bread is amazing. Very friendly place with great service and atmosphere. It's a real asset to the local community. The garden at the back is a real suntrap in spring and summer too.
reviews.author: V. S.

reviews.quote: I won't have a coffee in Crofton Park unless it's from Fred's. The BBQ sausage roll is legendary. The service is absolutely top notch too with the nicest baristas!
reviews.author: Matt Y.

reviews.quote: Absolutely love this coffee shop, such friendly staff and a very family friendly coffee shop who are always super tolerant of buggies, babies and toddlers. Delicious flatbreads and selection of cakes particularly noteworthy.
reviews.author: K. L.

reviews.quote: Fred's is great, delicious sandwiches and amazing coffee. The suntrap garden at the back is amazing in the summer. Always busy.
reviews.author: Neighbour

reviews.quote: I love Fred's! The drinks I've had there have all been good, the staff are friendly, and there is a good vibe for working. Nice music too.
reviews.author: Sister C.

reviews.quote: Great choice of food from poached eggs to the speciality Swedish flatbread sandwiches. An amazing selection of cakes and they serve Allpress coffee.
reviews.author: Local guest
